briefdescription.para: Demo mode IsPassThrough (TRUE) = Pass-through mode (FALSE) = Color Bar mode.
This function setup SI5324 clock generator over IIC.
This function setup SI5324 clock generator either in free or locked mode.

parameterdescription.para: specifies an index for selecting mode frequency.
specifies either free or locked mode.

listitem.para: Zero if error in programming external clock.

briefdescription.para: This function outputs the video timing , Audio, Link Status, HDMI RX state of HDMI RX core.

detaileddescription.para: In addition, it also prints information about HDMI TX, and HDMI GT cores.

briefdescription.para: This function is called whenever an error condition in VPHY occurs.

detaileddescription.para: This will fill the FIFO of VPHY error events which will be processed outside the ISR.

briefdescription.para: This function is called whenever a GTXE2 PLL layout error condition in VPHY occurs.

detaileddescription.para: This function can be used automatically switch the PLL layout. This will set the VPHY PLL Layout error flag to TRUE.

briefdescription.para: This function is called in the application to process the pending VPHY errors.

simplesect.para: This function can be expanded to perform necessary actions depending on the error type. For example, XVPHY_ERR_PLL_LAYOUT can be used to automatically switch in and out of bonded mode for GTXE2 devices

briefdescription.para: This function checks the system PLL, whether it's bonded or non-bonded.
This function setups the interrupt system so interrupts can occur for the HDMI cores.

detaileddescription.para: The function is application-specific since the actual system may or may not have an interrupt controller. The HDMI cores could be directly connected to a processor without an interrupt controller. The user should modify this function to fit the application.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

simplesect.para: This function assumes a Microblaze system and no operating system is used.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call example with HDMI TX, HDMI RX and HDMI GT drivers.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if HDMI example was successfully.
